# @hilum/ui — Design System

> Production-ready React design system with 74 components, OKLCH-based per-product theming, and CSS-variable-backed design tokens. Built for browser + Electron apps (no SSR / no Next.js). Tailwind v4 + Radix UI primitives.

## Installation

```bash
pnpm add @hilum/ui
# or: npm install @hilum/ui  |  yarn add @hilum/ui
```

Peer dependencies: `react@^19`, `react-dom@^19`, `tailwindcss@^4`

## Setup

```css
/* globals.css */
@import "tailwindcss";
@import "@hilum/ui/tokens.css";
```

That single import registers all design tokens as CSS custom properties and Tailwind v4 utilities (`bg-brand-primary`, `text-taupe-900`, `shadow-natural`, etc.).

---

## Theming

Every product gets its own primary and secondary brand colors. Pass two hex values — `createTheme` generates a full 11-shade OKLCH palette and returns a CSS override string.

```tsx
import { ThemeProvider } from "@hilum/ui/create-theme"

// Wrap your app root — re-applies automatically when props change
export function App() {
  return (
    <ThemeProvider primary="#0066FF" secondary="#FF9900">
      <Router />
    </ThemeProvider>
  )
}
```

### Theming API

| Export | Description |
|---|---|
| `createTheme({ primary, secondary })` | Pure function. Returns `{ css, palette }`. Works in Node (build scripts) and browser. |
| `applyTheme({ primary, secondary })` | Injects `<style>` into `document.head`. Returns cleanup fn. Browser/Electron only. |
| `<ThemeProvider primary secondary>` | React component. Calls `applyTheme` in `useEffect`. |

### ThemeConfig

| Prop | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `primary` | `string` | Hex color. Anchored at palette-500; 11 shades generated. |
| `secondary` | `string` | Hex color. Same structure. |

### ThemeResult

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `css` | `string` | Complete CSS override. Inject via `<style>` or write to a file. |
| `palette.primary` | `Record<string,string>` | `{ "50": "#f2f7ff", …, "950": "#000723" }` |
| `palette.secondary` | `Record<string,string>` | Same for secondary. |

### CSS variables overridden

- `--color-brand-primary` / `--color-brand-secondary` — affects all `bg-brand-*` utilities
- `--primary`, `--primary-foreground`
- `--accent`, `--accent-foreground`
- `--ring`
- `--warning`, `--warning-foreground`
- `--color-primary-{50…950}` / `--color-secondary-{50…950}` — palette vars for product CSS

---

## Design Tokens

### Colors

**Brand:**
- `bg-brand-primary` → `#C100F1` (vivid purple) — primary buttons, CTAs, focus rings
- `bg-brand-secondary` → `#FFF5BF` (pale lemon) — warning surfaces, secondary CTAs

**Purple scale** (`bg-purple-{50..950}`): built from `#C100F1` anchor at 500
**Butter scale** (`bg-butter-{50..950}`): built from `#FFF5BF` anchor at 200
**Taupe scale** (`bg-taupe-{50..950}`): neutral spine for text, borders, structure

**Semantic CSS vars** (use in custom CSS, never raw hex):
- `--background`, `--foreground` — page bg/text
- `--primary`, `--primary-foreground` — primary interactive color + its text
- `--secondary`, `--secondary-foreground` — secondary surfaces
- `--muted`, `--muted-foreground` — subdued surfaces and text
- `--accent`, `--accent-foreground` — hover tints
- `--border`, `--input` — borders and input backgrounds
- `--ring` — focus ring
- `--destructive`, `--destructive-foreground` — errors
- `--warning`, `--warning-foreground` — warnings

### Typography

Use as Tailwind utilities (e.g. `className="display"`):

| Class | Font | Size | Weight | Usage |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `display-xl` | Instrument Serif | 3rem | 400 | Hero H1 |
| `display` | Instrument Serif | 2.25rem | 400 | Page H1 |
| `heading-xl` | Instrument Serif | 1.875rem | 400 | Section headings |
| `heading` | Instrument Serif | 1.5rem | 400 | Card titles |
| `subheading` | Inter | 1.25rem | 400 | Subheadings |
| `body-lg` | Inter | 1rem | 400 | Large body text |
| `body` | Inter | 0.875rem | 400 | Default body |
| `caption` | Inter | 0.75rem | 400 | Metadata, helper text |
| `label` | Inter | 0.75rem | 600 | Section labels (uppercase) |
| `caption-xs` | Inter | 0.625rem | 400 | Tiny metadata |

### Shadows

- `shadow-natural` — cards, default elevation
- `shadow-elevated` — modals, floating panels

---

## Components

All components are imported from `@hilum/ui`.

---

### Button

Triggers actions. Supports variants, sizes, icons, and disabled/loading states.

```tsx
import { Button } from "@hilum/ui"

// Variants
<Button>Default</Button>
<Button variant="brand">Brand</Button>
<Button variant="outline">Outline</Button>
<Button variant="ghost">Ghost</Button>
<Button variant="secondary">Secondary</Button>
<Button variant="destructive">Destructive</Button>
<Button variant="link">Link</Button>

// Sizes
<Button size="xs">Extra Small</Button>
<Button size="sm">Small</Button>
<Button size="lg">Large</Button>
<Button size="icon"><Plus /></Button>

// Pill shape
<Button className="rounded-full">Get started</Button>

// Loading
<Button><Loader2 className="animate-spin" size={15} /> Saving...</Button>

// As child (polymorphic)
<Button asChild><a href="/path">Link button</a></Button>
```

Props: `variant`, `size`, `asChild`, `disabled`, plus all `<button>` props.

---

### Badge

Compact labels for status, categories, and metadata.

```tsx
import { Badge } from "@hilum/ui"

<Badge>Default</Badge>
<Badge variant="secondary">Secondary</Badge>
<Badge variant="outline">Outline</Badge>
<Badge variant="brand">Brand</Badge>
<Badge variant="success">Success</Badge>
<Badge variant="warning">Warning</Badge>
<Badge variant="destructive">Error</Badge>
```

Props: `variant`.

---

### Input

Text input field. Styled with taupe palette and brand focus ring.

```tsx
import { Input } from "@hilum/ui"

<Input placeholder="Email address" />
<Input type="password" />
<Input disabled value="Read-only" />
```

Accepts all `<input>` props.

---

### Textarea

Multi-line text input.

```tsx
import { Textarea } from "@hilum/ui"

<Textarea placeholder="Describe your issue..." rows={4} />
```

Accepts all `<textarea>` props.

---

### Label

Accessible label for form fields. Pairs with any input via `htmlFor`.

```tsx
import { Label } from "@hilum/ui"

<Label htmlFor="email">Email address</Label>
<Input id="email" type="email" />
```

---

### Field

Composed form field: label + input + helper/error text.

```tsx
import { Field } from "@hilum/ui"

<Field label="Email" hint="We'll never share your email.">
  <Input placeholder="you@example.com" />
</Field>

<Field label="Username" error="Username is already taken">
  <Input value="john" />
</Field>
```

Props: `label`, `hint`, `error`, `required`, `children`.

---

### Select

Dropdown selection backed by Radix UI.

```tsx
import { Select, SelectTrigger, SelectValue, SelectContent, SelectItem } from "@hilum/ui"

<Select>
  <SelectTrigger>
    <SelectValue placeholder="Pick a fruit" />
  </SelectTrigger>
  <SelectContent>
    <SelectItem value="apple">Apple</SelectItem>
    <SelectItem value="banana">Banana</SelectItem>
    <SelectItem value="mango">Mango</SelectItem>
  </SelectContent>
</Select>
```

---

### Combobox

Searchable select with filterable options.

```tsx
import { Combobox } from "@hilum/ui"

<Combobox
  options={[
    { value: "react", label: "React" },
    { value: "vue", label: "Vue" },
    { value: "svelte", label: "Svelte" },
  ]}
  placeholder="Select framework..."
  value={value}
  onValueChange={setValue}
/>
```

Props: `options`, `value`, `onValueChange`, `placeholder`, `disabled`.

---

### Dialog

Modal overlay with header, content, and footer.

```tsx
import {
  Dialog, DialogTrigger, DialogContent,
  DialogHeader, DialogTitle, DialogDescription, DialogFooter,
} from "@hilum/ui"

<Dialog>
  <DialogTrigger asChild>
    <Button>Open dialog</Button>
  </DialogTrigger>
  <DialogContent>
    <DialogHeader>
      <DialogTitle>Confirm deletion</DialogTitle>
      <DialogDescription>This action cannot be undone.</DialogDescription>
    </DialogHeader>
    <DialogFooter>
      <Button variant="outline">Cancel</Button>
      <Button variant="destructive">Delete</Button>
    </DialogFooter>
  </DialogContent>
</Dialog>
```

---

### Sheet

Slide-in panel from any edge of the screen.

```tsx
import {
  Sheet, SheetTrigger, SheetContent,
  SheetHeader, SheetTitle, SheetDescription,
} from "@hilum/ui"

<Sheet>
  <SheetTrigger asChild><Button>Open sheet</Button></SheetTrigger>
  <SheetContent side="right">   {/* side: "top" | "right" | "bottom" | "left" */}
    <SheetHeader>
      <SheetTitle>Edit profile</SheetTitle>
      <SheetDescription>Make changes to your profile here.</SheetDescription>
    </SheetHeader>
    {/* content */}
  </SheetContent>
</Sheet>
```

---

### Drawer

Bottom drawer for mobile-friendly overlays.

```tsx
import { Drawer, DrawerTrigger, DrawerContent, DrawerHeader, DrawerTitle } from "@hilum/ui"

<Drawer>
  <DrawerTrigger asChild><Button>Open drawer</Button></DrawerTrigger>
  <DrawerContent>
    <DrawerHeader>
      <DrawerTitle>Filters</DrawerTitle>
    </DrawerHeader>
    {/* content */}
  </DrawerContent>
</Drawer>
```

---

### Popover

Floating content anchored to a trigger element.

```tsx
import { Popover, PopoverTrigger, PopoverContent } from "@hilum/ui"

<Popover>
  <PopoverTrigger asChild><Button variant="outline">Open</Button></PopoverTrigger>
  <PopoverContent>
    <p className="body">Popover content here.</p>
  </PopoverContent>
</Popover>
```

---

### Tooltip

Short contextual hint on hover/focus.

```tsx
import { Tooltip, TooltipTrigger, TooltipContent, TooltipProvider } from "@hilum/ui"

<TooltipProvider>
  <Tooltip>
    <TooltipTrigger asChild><Button size="icon"><Settings /></Button></TooltipTrigger>
    <TooltipContent>Settings</TooltipContent>
  </Tooltip>
</TooltipProvider>
```

Wrap app root with `<TooltipProvider>` once.

---

### Dropdown Menu

Context menu for actions attached to a trigger button.

```tsx
import {
  DropdownMenu, DropdownMenuTrigger, DropdownMenuContent,
  DropdownMenuItem, DropdownMenuSeparator, DropdownMenuLabel,
} from "@hilum/ui"

<DropdownMenu>
  <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild><Button variant="outline">Actions</Button></DropdownMenuTrigger>
  <DropdownMenuContent>
    <DropdownMenuLabel>My account</DropdownMenuLabel>
    <DropdownMenuSeparator />
    <DropdownMenuItem>Profile</DropdownMenuItem>
    <DropdownMenuItem>Settings</DropdownMenuItem>
    <DropdownMenuSeparator />
    <DropdownMenuItem className="text-destructive">Sign out</DropdownMenuItem>
  </DropdownMenuContent>
</DropdownMenu>
```

---

### Context Menu

Right-click / long-press menu.

```tsx
import {
  ContextMenu, ContextMenuTrigger, ContextMenuContent, ContextMenuItem,
} from "@hilum/ui"

<ContextMenu>
  <ContextMenuTrigger>Right-click me</ContextMenuTrigger>
  <ContextMenuContent>
    <ContextMenuItem>Copy</ContextMenuItem>
    <ContextMenuItem>Paste</ContextMenuItem>
    <ContextMenuItem className="text-destructive">Delete</ContextMenuItem>
  </ContextMenuContent>
</ContextMenu>
```

---

### Card

Versatile surface container.

```tsx
import { Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardContent, CardFooter } from "@hilum/ui"

<Card>
  <CardHeader>
    <CardTitle className="subheading">Card title</CardTitle>
    <CardDescription className="body">Supporting text.</CardDescription>
  </CardHeader>
  <CardContent>
    <p className="body text-taupe-500">Content goes here.</p>
  </CardContent>
  <CardFooter>
    <Button>Action</Button>
  </CardFooter>
</Card>
```

Variants: `default` (white with natural shadow), `muted` (taupe-50).

---

### Tabs

Horizontal tab navigation with content panels.

```tsx
import { Tabs, TabsList, TabsTrigger, TabsContent } from "@hilum/ui"

<Tabs defaultValue="overview">
  <TabsList>
    <TabsTrigger value="overview">Overview</TabsTrigger>
    <TabsTrigger value="settings">Settings</TabsTrigger>
    <TabsTrigger value="billing">Billing</TabsTrigger>
  </TabsList>
  <TabsContent value="overview">Overview content</TabsContent>
  <TabsContent value="settings">Settings content</TabsContent>
  <TabsContent value="billing">Billing content</TabsContent>
</Tabs>
```

---

### Accordion

Collapsible content sections.

```tsx
import { Accordion, AccordionItem, AccordionTrigger, AccordionContent } from "@hilum/ui"

<Accordion type="single" collapsible>
  <AccordionItem value="item-1">
    <AccordionTrigger>Is it accessible?</AccordionTrigger>
    <AccordionContent>Yes. It adheres to WAI-ARIA.</AccordionContent>
  </AccordionItem>
  <AccordionItem value="item-2">
    <AccordionTrigger>Is it styled?</AccordionTrigger>
    <AccordionContent>Yes. Comes with default styles.</AccordionContent>
  </AccordionItem>
</Accordion>
```

`type`: `"single"` | `"multiple"`. `collapsible`: allow closing when single.

---

### Avatar

User profile image with fallback initials.

```tsx
import { Avatar, AvatarImage, AvatarFallback } from "@hilum/ui"

<Avatar>
  <AvatarImage src="https://example.com/photo.jpg" alt="Jane Doe" />
  <AvatarFallback>JD</AvatarFallback>
</Avatar>

// Sizes: xs, sm, default, lg, xl
<Avatar size="sm"><AvatarFallback>AB</AvatarFallback></Avatar>
```

---

### Avatar Stack

Overlapping row of avatars with overflow count.

```tsx
import { AvatarStack, Avatar, AvatarFallback } from "@hilum/ui"

<AvatarStack>
  <Avatar><AvatarFallback>AB</AvatarFallback></Avatar>
  <Avatar><AvatarFallback>CD</AvatarFallback></Avatar>
  <Avatar><AvatarFallback>EF</AvatarFallback></Avatar>
</AvatarStack>
```

---

### Checkbox

Binary selection with accessible label.

```tsx
import { Checkbox } from "@hilum/ui"

<div className="flex items-center gap-2">
  <Checkbox id="terms" checked={checked} onCheckedChange={setChecked} />
  <Label htmlFor="terms">Accept terms and conditions</Label>
</div>
```

---

### Switch

Toggle between two states.

```tsx
import { Switch } from "@hilum/ui"

<Switch checked={enabled} onCheckedChange={setEnabled} />
```

---

### Slider

Range input for selecting a numeric value.

```tsx
import { Slider } from "@hilum/ui"

<Slider
  min={0}
  max={100}
  step={1}
  value={[volume]}
  onValueChange={([v]) => setVolume(v)}
/>
```

---

### Radio Group

Single-selection from a group of options.

```tsx
import { RadioGroup, RadioGroupItem } from "@hilum/ui"

<RadioGroup value={plan} onValueChange={setPlan}>
  <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
    <RadioGroupItem value="starter" id="starter" />
    <Label htmlFor="starter">Starter</Label>
  </div>
  <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
    <RadioGroupItem value="pro" id="pro" />
    <Label htmlFor="pro">Pro</Label>
  </div>
</RadioGroup>
```

---

### Progress

Linear progress indicator.

```tsx
import { Progress } from "@hilum/ui"

<Progress value={72} />   // 0–100
```

---

### Skeleton

Loading placeholder that matches content layout.

```tsx
import { Skeleton } from "@hilum/ui"

<Skeleton className="h-4 w-48 rounded" />
<Skeleton className="h-32 w-full rounded-xl" />
```

---

### Spinner

Animated loading indicator.

```tsx
import { Spinner } from "@hilum/ui"

<Spinner />
<Spinner size="sm" />
<Spinner size="lg" />
```

---

### Separator

Horizontal or vertical divider line.

```tsx
import { Separator } from "@hilum/ui"

<Separator />
<Separator orientation="vertical" className="h-8" />
```

---

### Breadcrumb

Navigation hierarchy indicator.

```tsx
import {
  Breadcrumb, BreadcrumbList, BreadcrumbItem,
  BreadcrumbLink, BreadcrumbPage, BreadcrumbSeparator,
} from "@hilum/ui"

<Breadcrumb>
  <BreadcrumbList>
    <BreadcrumbItem><BreadcrumbLink href="/">Home</BreadcrumbLink></BreadcrumbItem>
    <BreadcrumbSeparator />
    <BreadcrumbItem><BreadcrumbLink href="/docs">Docs</BreadcrumbLink></BreadcrumbItem>
    <BreadcrumbSeparator />
    <BreadcrumbItem><BreadcrumbPage>Button</BreadcrumbPage></BreadcrumbItem>
  </BreadcrumbList>
</Breadcrumb>
```

---

### Pagination

Page navigation for data lists.

```tsx
import {
  Pagination, PaginationContent, PaginationItem,
  PaginationLink, PaginationPrevious, PaginationNext, PaginationEllipsis,
} from "@hilum/ui"

<Pagination>
  <PaginationContent>
    <PaginationItem><PaginationPrevious href="#" /></PaginationItem>
    <PaginationItem><PaginationLink href="#">1</PaginationLink></PaginationItem>
    <PaginationItem><PaginationEllipsis /></PaginationItem>
    <PaginationItem><PaginationLink href="#" isActive>5</PaginationLink></PaginationItem>
    <PaginationItem><PaginationNext href="#" /></PaginationItem>
  </PaginationContent>
</Pagination>
```

---

### Table

Data table with header, body, and footer.

```tsx
import { Table, TableHeader, TableBody, TableRow, TableHead, TableCell, TableCaption } from "@hilum/ui"

<Table>
  <TableHeader>
    <TableRow>
      <TableHead>Name</TableHead>
      <TableHead>Status</TableHead>
      <TableHead className="text-right">Amount</TableHead>
    </TableRow>
  </TableHeader>
  <TableBody>
    <TableRow>
      <TableCell className="font-medium">Alice</TableCell>
      <TableCell><Badge variant="success">Active</Badge></TableCell>
      <TableCell className="text-right">$250</TableCell>
    </TableRow>
  </TableBody>
</Table>
```

---

### Data Table

Full-featured table with sorting, filtering, pagination via `@tanstack/react-table`.

```tsx
import { DataTable } from "@hilum/ui"
import { ColumnDef } from "@tanstack/react-table"

const columns: ColumnDef<User>[] = [
  { accessorKey: "name", header: "Name" },
  { accessorKey: "email", header: "Email" },
  { accessorKey: "role", header: "Role" },
]

<DataTable columns={columns} data={users} />
```

---

### Calendar

Date picker calendar grid.

```tsx
import { Calendar } from "@hilum/ui"

<Calendar
  mode="single"
  selected={date}
  onSelect={setDate}
/>
```

Modes: `"single"` | `"multiple"` | `"range"`. Powered by `react-day-picker`.

---

### Date Picker

Calendar in a popover triggered by a button.

```tsx
import { DatePicker } from "@hilum/ui"

<DatePicker value={date} onChange={setDate} placeholder="Pick a date" />
```

---

### Command

Command palette / search interface.

```tsx
import {
  Command, CommandInput, CommandList,
  CommandEmpty, CommandGroup, CommandItem, CommandSeparator,
} from "@hilum/ui"

<Command>
  <CommandInput placeholder="Search..." />
  <CommandList>
    <CommandEmpty>No results found.</CommandEmpty>
    <CommandGroup heading="Actions">
      <CommandItem>New file</CommandItem>
      <CommandItem>New folder</CommandItem>
    </CommandGroup>
    <CommandSeparator />
    <CommandGroup heading="Navigation">
      <CommandItem>Dashboard</CommandItem>
    </CommandGroup>
  </CommandList>
</Command>
```

---

### Navigation Menu

Horizontal nav with mega-menu dropdowns.

```tsx
import {
  NavigationMenu, NavigationMenuList, NavigationMenuItem,
  NavigationMenuTrigger, NavigationMenuContent, NavigationMenuLink,
} from "@hilum/ui"

<NavigationMenu>
  <NavigationMenuList>
    <NavigationMenuItem>
      <NavigationMenuTrigger>Products</NavigationMenuTrigger>
      <NavigationMenuContent>
        {/* Grid of links */}
      </NavigationMenuContent>
    </NavigationMenuItem>
    <NavigationMenuItem>
      <NavigationMenuLink href="/pricing">Pricing</NavigationMenuLink>
    </NavigationMenuItem>
  </NavigationMenuList>
</NavigationMenu>
```

---

### Menubar

Application-style horizontal menu bar.

```tsx
import {
  Menubar, MenubarMenu, MenubarTrigger, MenubarContent,
  MenubarItem, MenubarSeparator, MenubarCheckboxItem, MenubarRadioGroup, MenubarRadioItem,
} from "@hilum/ui"

<Menubar>
  <MenubarMenu>
    <MenubarTrigger>File</MenubarTrigger>
    <MenubarContent>
      <MenubarItem>New File <MenubarShortcut>⌘N</MenubarShortcut></MenubarItem>
      <MenubarSeparator />
      <MenubarItem>Save <MenubarShortcut>⌘S</MenubarShortcut></MenubarItem>
    </MenubarContent>
  </MenubarMenu>
</Menubar>
```

---

### Sidebar

Full application sidebar with navigation groups, collapsible sections, and sticky header/footer.

```tsx
import {
  SidebarProvider, Sidebar, SidebarHeader, SidebarContent,
  SidebarGroup, SidebarGroupLabel, SidebarMenu, SidebarMenuItem,
  SidebarMenuButton, SidebarFooter,
} from "@hilum/ui"

<SidebarProvider>
  <Sidebar>
    <SidebarHeader>Logo / brand</SidebarHeader>
    <SidebarContent>
      <SidebarGroup>
        <SidebarGroupLabel>Navigation</SidebarGroupLabel>
        <SidebarMenu>
          <SidebarMenuItem>
            <SidebarMenuButton asChild>
              <a href="/dashboard">Dashboard</a>
            </SidebarMenuButton>
          </SidebarMenuItem>
        </SidebarMenu>
      </SidebarGroup>
    </SidebarContent>
    <SidebarFooter>Footer content</SidebarFooter>
  </Sidebar>
  <main>{/* page content */}</main>
</SidebarProvider>
```

---

### Chart

Recharts-based data visualizations (line, bar, area, pie, radar, radial).

```tsx
import { ChartContainer, ChartTooltip, ChartTooltipContent } from "@hilum/ui"
import { LineChart, Line, XAxis, YAxis, CartesianGrid } from "recharts"

const config = {
  revenue: { label: "Revenue", color: "var(--color-brand-primary)" },
}

<ChartContainer config={config} className="h-64">
  <LineChart data={data}>
    <CartesianGrid strokeDasharray="3 3" stroke="var(--color-taupe-100)" />
    <XAxis dataKey="month" />
    <YAxis />
    <ChartTooltip content={<ChartTooltipContent />} />
    <Line type="monotone" dataKey="revenue" stroke="var(--chart-1)" />
  </LineChart>
</ChartContainer>
```

---

### Carousel

Horizontal scrolling carousel.

```tsx
import { Carousel, CarouselContent, CarouselItem, CarouselPrevious, CarouselNext } from "@hilum/ui"

<Carousel>
  <CarouselContent>
    <CarouselItem><Card>Slide 1</Card></CarouselItem>
    <CarouselItem><Card>Slide 2</Card></CarouselItem>
    <CarouselItem><Card>Slide 3</Card></CarouselItem>
  </CarouselContent>
  <CarouselPrevious />
  <CarouselNext />
</Carousel>
```

---

### Hover Card

Rich preview card that appears on hover.

```tsx
import { HoverCard, HoverCardTrigger, HoverCardContent } from "@hilum/ui"

<HoverCard>
  <HoverCardTrigger asChild>
    <a href="#">@hilum_labs</a>
  </HoverCardTrigger>
  <HoverCardContent>
    <p className="body font-medium">Hilum Labs</p>
    <p className="caption text-taupe-400">Building the future of education.</p>
  </HoverCardContent>
</HoverCard>
```

---

### Collapsible

Show/hide any content section.

```tsx
import { Collapsible, CollapsibleTrigger, CollapsibleContent } from "@hilum/ui"

<Collapsible open={open} onOpenChange={setOpen}>
  <CollapsibleTrigger asChild>
    <Button variant="ghost">Advanced options <ChevronDown size={14} /></Button>
  </CollapsibleTrigger>
  <CollapsibleContent>
    {/* hidden content */}
  </CollapsibleContent>
</Collapsible>
```

---

### Resizable

Draggable panels for split layouts.

```tsx
import { ResizablePanelGroup, ResizablePanel, ResizableHandle } from "@hilum/ui"

<ResizablePanelGroup direction="horizontal" className="h-64 rounded-xl border">
  <ResizablePanel defaultSize={30}>Left</ResizablePanel>
  <ResizableHandle />
  <ResizablePanel>Right</ResizablePanel>
</ResizablePanelGroup>
```

---

### Scroll Area

Custom scrollbar for overflow containers.

```tsx
import { ScrollArea } from "@hilum/ui"

<ScrollArea className="h-48 w-full">
  {/* long content */}
</ScrollArea>
```

---

### Kbd

Keyboard shortcut display.

```tsx
import { Kbd } from "@hilum/ui"

<p className="body">Press <Kbd>⌘</Kbd> + <Kbd>K</Kbd> to open the command palette.</p>
```

---

### Alert

Contextual feedback for user actions or system states.

```tsx
import { Alert, AlertTitle, AlertDescription } from "@hilum/ui"
import { Terminal } from "lucide-react"

<Alert>
  <Terminal size={16} />
  <AlertTitle>Heads up!</AlertTitle>
  <AlertDescription>You can add components and dependencies to your app.</AlertDescription>
</Alert>

<Alert variant="destructive">
  <AlertTitle>Error</AlertTitle>
  <AlertDescription>Something went wrong. Please try again.</AlertDescription>
</Alert>
```

---

### Alert Dialog

Modal that requires user confirmation before a destructive action.

```tsx
import {
  AlertDialog, AlertDialogTrigger, AlertDialogContent,
  AlertDialogHeader, AlertDialogTitle, AlertDialogDescription,
  AlertDialogFooter, AlertDialogCancel, AlertDialogAction,
} from "@hilum/ui"

<AlertDialog>
  <AlertDialogTrigger asChild><Button variant="destructive">Delete</Button></AlertDialogTrigger>
  <AlertDialogContent>
    <AlertDialogHeader>
      <AlertDialogTitle>Are you absolutely sure?</AlertDialogTitle>
      <AlertDialogDescription>This action cannot be undone.</AlertDialogDescription>
    </AlertDialogHeader>
    <AlertDialogFooter>
      <AlertDialogCancel>Cancel</AlertDialogCancel>
      <AlertDialogAction>Continue</AlertDialogAction>
    </AlertDialogFooter>
  </AlertDialogContent>
</AlertDialog>
```

---

### Sonner (Toast)

Non-blocking notification toasts. Requires `<Toaster />` in app root.

```tsx
// App.tsx
import { Toaster } from "@hilum/ui"
<Toaster />

// Anywhere in the app
import { toast } from "sonner"

toast("Event has been created")
toast.success("Profile saved successfully")
toast.error("Something went wrong")
toast.loading("Uploading...")
toast.promise(uploadFn(), {
  loading: "Uploading...",
  success: "Done!",
  error: "Upload failed",
})
```

---

### Input OTP

One-time password / PIN code input.

```tsx
import { InputOTP, InputOTPGroup, InputOTPSlot, InputOTPSeparator } from "@hilum/ui"

<InputOTP maxLength={6} value={otp} onChange={setOtp}>
  <InputOTPGroup>
    <InputOTPSlot index={0} />
    <InputOTPSlot index={1} />
    <InputOTPSlot index={2} />
  </InputOTPGroup>
  <InputOTPSeparator />
  <InputOTPGroup>
    <InputOTPSlot index={3} />
    <InputOTPSlot index={4} />
    <InputOTPSlot index={5} />
  </InputOTPGroup>
</InputOTP>
```

---

### Steps

Step indicator for multi-step flows.

```tsx
import { Steps, Step } from "@hilum/ui"

<Steps current={1}>
  <Step label="Account" />
  <Step label="Profile" />
  <Step label="Review" />
</Steps>
```

Props: `current` (0-indexed), `orientation` (`"horizontal"` | `"vertical"`).

---

### Toggle / Toggle Group

Single or grouped toggle buttons.

```tsx
import { Toggle } from "@hilum/ui"
import { Bold, Italic, Underline } from "lucide-react"

<Toggle pressed={bold} onPressedChange={setBold}><Bold size={14} /></Toggle>

// Group
import { ToggleGroup, ToggleGroupItem } from "@hilum/ui"

<ToggleGroup type="multiple" value={formatting} onValueChange={setFormatting}>
  <ToggleGroupItem value="bold"><Bold size={14} /></ToggleGroupItem>
  <ToggleGroupItem value="italic"><Italic size={14} /></ToggleGroupItem>
  <ToggleGroupItem value="underline"><Underline size={14} /></ToggleGroupItem>
</ToggleGroup>
```

---

### Aspect Ratio

Maintains a fixed aspect ratio for any child.

```tsx
import { AspectRatio } from "@hilum/ui"

<AspectRatio ratio={16 / 9} className="bg-taupe-100 rounded-xl overflow-hidden">
  <img src="..." className="w-full h-full object-cover" />
</AspectRatio>
```

---

### Button Group

Groups buttons into a connected row with shared borders.

```tsx
import { ButtonGroup } from "@hilum/ui"

<ButtonGroup>
  <Button variant="outline">Bold</Button>
  <Button variant="outline">Italic</Button>
  <Button variant="outline">Underline</Button>
</ButtonGroup>
```

---

### Native Select

Native `<select>` styled to match the design system.

```tsx
import { NativeSelect } from "@hilum/ui"

<NativeSelect value={country} onChange={e => setCountry(e.target.value)}>
  <option value="">Select country</option>
  <option value="us">United States</option>
  <option value="uk">United Kingdom</option>
</NativeSelect>
```

---

## Molecules

Composed patterns built from atoms.

---

### Field

Labeled form field with hint and error support. (See Atoms → Field above.)

---

### Input Group

Input with leading/trailing addons (icons, buttons, text).

```tsx
import { InputGroup, InputGroupAddon } from "@hilum/ui"

<InputGroup>
  <InputGroupAddon><Mail size={14} className="text-taupe-400" /></InputGroupAddon>
  <Input placeholder="Email address" />
</InputGroup>

<InputGroup>
  <Input placeholder="0.00" />
  <InputGroupAddon>USD</InputGroupAddon>
</InputGroup>
```

---

### Stat Card

Metric display with label, value, trend, and optional icon.

```tsx
import { StatCard } from "@hilum/ui"
import { TrendingUp } from "lucide-react"

<StatCard
  label="Total revenue"
  value="$45,231"
  change="+20.1%"
  trend="up"
  icon={TrendingUp}
/>
```

Props: `label`, `value`, `change`, `trend` (`"up"` | `"down"` | `"neutral"`), `icon`.

---

### Empty State

Zero-state UI for empty lists or no-results states.

```tsx
import { EmptyState } from "@hilum/ui"
import { FileX } from "lucide-react"

<EmptyState
  icon={FileX}
  title="No documents found"
  description="Try adjusting your filters or create a new document."
  action={<Button>New document</Button>}
/>
```

---

### Section Heading

Labeled section divider with optional action.

```tsx
import { SectionHeading } from "@hilum/ui"

<SectionHeading title="Recent activity" />
<SectionHeading title="Team members" action={<Button size="sm">Invite</Button>} />
```

---

### Page Heading

Full-width page header with title, description, breadcrumb, and actions.

```tsx
import { PageHeading } from "@hilum/ui"

<PageHeading
  title="Projects"
  description="Manage your team's active projects."
  action={<Button>New project</Button>}
/>
```

---

### Card Heading

Section header inside a card — title, description, and optional right-side action.

```tsx
import { CardHeading } from "@hilum/ui"

<CardHeading
  title="Team members"
  description="Invite and manage access."
  action={<Button size="sm" variant="outline">Invite</Button>}
/>
```

---

### Activity Feed

Vertical timeline of events.

```tsx
import { ActivityFeed, ActivityFeedItem } from "@hilum/ui"
import { GitCommit } from "lucide-react"

<ActivityFeed>
  <ActivityFeedItem
    icon={GitCommit}
    title="Merged pull request #42"
    description="main ← feat/theming"
    timestamp="2 hours ago"
  />
</ActivityFeed>
```

---

### Stacked List

Vertical list of items with dividers.

```tsx
import { StackedList, StackedListItem } from "@hilum/ui"

<StackedList>
  <StackedListItem
    primary="Alice Johnson"
    secondary="alice@example.com"
    meta="Admin"
    avatar={<Avatar size="sm"><AvatarFallback>AJ</AvatarFallback></Avatar>}
  />
</StackedList>
```

---

### Grid List

Responsive card grid.

```tsx
import { GridList, GridListItem } from "@hilum/ui"

<GridList>
  {items.map(item => (
    <GridListItem key={item.id} title={item.name} description={item.desc} />
  ))}
</GridList>
```

---

### Description List

Key–value pairs, typically for detail/profile views.

```tsx
import { DescriptionList, DescriptionListItem } from "@hilum/ui"

<DescriptionList>
  <DescriptionListItem label="Full name" value="Alice Johnson" />
  <DescriptionListItem label="Email" value="alice@example.com" />
  <DescriptionListItem label="Role" value="Administrator" />
</DescriptionList>
```

---

### Notification

Single notification item with icon, title, message, and timestamp.

```tsx
import { Notification } from "@hilum/ui"

<Notification
  title="New message"
  description="Alice sent you a message in #general"
  timestamp="5 minutes ago"
  unread
/>
```

---

### Media Object

Horizontal layout: media (image/icon/avatar) + content body.

```tsx
import { MediaObject } from "@hilum/ui"

<MediaObject
  media={<Avatar><AvatarFallback>AB</AvatarFallback></Avatar>}
  title="Alice Brown"
  description="Sent you a project update for Q3 2025."
  meta="2h ago"
/>
```

---

### Radio Card

Selectable card with radio button — used for plan/option selection.

```tsx
import { RadioCard, RadioCardGroup } from "@hilum/ui"

<RadioCardGroup value={plan} onValueChange={setPlan}>
  <RadioCard value="starter" title="Starter" description="Up to 5 users" price="$9/mo" />
  <RadioCard value="pro" title="Pro" description="Up to 50 users" price="$49/mo" />
</RadioCardGroup>
```

---

### Action Panel

Bordered panel with a title, description, and a call-to-action.

```tsx
import { ActionPanel } from "@hilum/ui"

<ActionPanel
  title="Danger zone"
  description="Deleting your account is permanent and cannot be undone."
  action={<Button variant="destructive">Delete account</Button>}
/>
```

---

### Command Palette

Full-screen search overlay, usually opened by ⌘K.

```tsx
import { CommandPalette } from "@hilum/ui"

// Open state controlled externally
<CommandPalette
  open={open}
  onOpenChange={setOpen}
  items={[
    { id: "dashboard", label: "Go to Dashboard", href: "/dashboard" },
    { id: "settings", label: "Open Settings", href: "/settings" },
  ]}
/>
```

---

## Utilities

```tsx
import { cn } from "@hilum/ui"

// Tailwind class merge utility (clsx + tailwind-merge)
<div className={cn("p-4 rounded-xl", isActive && "bg-brand-primary text-white")} />
```

---

## Icons

Curated subset from lucide-react, re-exported for convenience:

```tsx
import { PlusIcon, SearchIcon, SettingsIcon } from "@hilum/ui/icons"
```

---

## Design decisions

- **No SSR / no Next.js** — all apps are plain React (Vite + Electron)
- **Tailwind v4** — CSS-variable-backed utilities, runtime-overridable via `createTheme`
- **Radix UI primitives** — all interactive components are WAI-ARIA compliant
- **Lockstep versioning** — all packages release together
- **OKLCH color space** — all generated palettes use perceptually uniform interpolation
